description_for_human: 23 pay-per-call web analysis APIs for AI agents
description_for_model: APIMesh provides 23 pay-per-call web analysis APIs. email-verify: Verify email addresses — syntax, MX record check, disposable domain detection, role-address detection, and deliverability assessment. ($0.001). tech-stack: Detect website technology stack — CMS, frameworks, analytics, CDN, hosting, JS libraries, and CSS frameworks from headers and HTML. ($0.003). mock-jwt-generator: mock-jwt-generator API ($0.001). email-security: Validate SPF, DKIM (probes 10 common selectors), and DMARC records for any domain. Detects email provider and grades overall email security. ($0.01). robots-txt-parser: Website URL to analyze robots.txt ($0.002). web-checker: Check brand/product name availability across 5 TLDs (.com, .io, .dev, .app, .xyz), GitHub, npm, PyPI, and Reddit in one call. ($0.005). seo-audit: Comprehensive on-page SEO analysis — title, meta, headings, images, links, OG tags, JSON-LD, and robots directives with a 0-100 score. ($0.003). brand-assets: Extract brand assets from any domain — logo URL, favicon, theme colors, OG image, and site name. ($0.002). user-agent-analyzer: user-agent-analyzer API ($0.002). redirect-chain: Trace the full HTTP redirect chain for any URL with per-hop status codes, latency, and loop detection. ($0.001). regex-builder: Provides an interface to construct and test regular expressions. ($0.005). swagger-docs-creator: Generate basic Swagger (OpenAPI 3.0.x) documentation for your API endpoint. ($0.002). core-web-vitals: Google PageSpeed Insights analysis — Lighthouse performance, accessibility, SEO scores plus LCP, CLS, INP field data from Chrome UX Report. ($0.005). web-resource-validator: Validate presence and correctness of common web resources like robots.txt, sitemap.xml, openapi.json, agent.json ($0.001). status-code-checker: Checks the status code of any valid URL, returning accessibility and HTTP response info. ($0.001). website-security-header-info: website-security-header-info API ($0.01). yaml-validator: yaml-validator API ($0.002). favicon-checker: favicon-checker API ($0.002). security-headers: Audit 10 HTTP security headers (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, etc.) with A+ to F grading and remediation suggestions. ($0.005). http-status-checker: Checks the HTTP status of a given URL to ensure it is accessible and returns the expected response code. ($0.002). website-vulnerability-scan: website-vulnerability-scan API ($0.05). indexability: 5-layer indexability analysis — robots.txt, HTTP status, meta robots, X-Robots-Tag, and canonical. Returns whether a URL is indexable. ($0.001). microservice-health-check: microservice-health-check API ($0.003). Each API has /health and / info endpoints. Most have free /preview endpoints. Supports x402, MPP, and API key payments.
